wizard_integration_module.note: framework list duplicated across 3 functions; must be updated in concert

codex_role_files.note: character-identical between distros for npm-based harnesses

patterns_to_reuse: function-boundary-patch: patch _get_latest_*_version helpers at clauded.cli boundary, not subprocess level
discriminating-lambda-mock: side_effect=lambda vm, cmd: 'X' if 'tool' in cmd else 'Y' for _get_vm_tool_version
recording-select-side-effect: capture _menu_select calls to assert default index and offered items
paired-include-exclude-methods: test_includes_X / test_excludes_X method pairs in test_provisioner
isolated-filesystem-yaml: runner.isolated_filesystem() + inline .clauded.yaml writes for CLI tests
conditional-versions-block: emit `versions:` only when at least one pin is non-None (config.py:546)
non-configurable-default-injection: prepend always-present frameworks before user multi-select (wizard.py:209)
unconditional-host-mount: ~/.codex mounted regardless of frameworks (lima.py:407); follow same pattern for ~/.config/opencode and ~/.local/share/opencode

patterns_to_diverge_from.reason: opencode is a static binary installed via official script (curl|bash). Latest version comes from GitHub releases API, NOT npm registry. New helper _get_latest_opencode_version() must hit https://api.github.com/repos/anomalyco/opencode/releases/latest and parse tag_name.

claude-code and codex are always installed; opencode is opt-in (ADR-004). Wizard offers it in the multi-select alongside playwright; provisioner only adds the role when 'opencode' in config.frameworks.

opencode TUI does not accept --dangerously-skip-permissions; auto-accept is config-file-based on opencode's side. Dispatcher must NOT append any flag for the opencode harness regardless of claude_dangerously_skip_permissions.

fragile_seams_requiring_coordinated_upda.risk: opencode must be added to all 4 lists or wizard behavior diverges between create/edit/detect flows
if only one of these is extended for opencode, update prompts become inconsistent
untyped dict[str, str | list[str] | bool]; harness key must be added in both producer and consumer
Claude-code-specific workaround; dispatcher must scope it to claude-code branch only and drop entirely after Alpine removal (boy-scout per spec)

build_commands.lint: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
build_commands.format_check: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/

project_conventions: ALL feature work + bug fixes MUST add CHANGELOG.md entry under [Unreleased]
NEVER tailor production code to tests
NEVER use Ansible file: state: absent on Lima mount paths (use command: rmdir)
Type hints required everywhere; mypy on src/ only (tests/ untyped)
Boy-scout: small adjacent fixes allowed; do not expand scope into refactors
